rationale: New server feature (clustered indexes) requiring driver awareness; Issue split coordination ticket, no spec nonconformance.
DRIVERS coordination ticket to remove ElectionInProgress from ResumableChangeStreamError in the spec, with per-driver child tickets.
DRIVERS coordination ticket from SPEC-1578; spec clarified WriteConcernError errInfo propagation, drivers need to validate/update.
DRIVERS coordination ticket for new speculative authentication feature in spec; not a prior nonconformance.
SPEC-1505 did not treat CursorNotFound as resumable; fix required spec amendment. Root cause was spec gap, not driver error.
DRIVERS coordination ticket for SDAM spec update to add topologyVersion, stale error handling; spec changes with new YAML tests.
Spec was unclear on wrong setName in single topology; different drivers handled it differently; fix required spec amendment.
DRIVERS coordination ticket adding CRUD spec tests for hint error on unacknowledged deletes; test rollout via SPEC-1651/1664.
FLE test used admin DB causing failures on sharded cluster; SPEC-1669 updated tests to use keyvault DB; drivers must resync.
Resync CRUD spec tests to new transaction spec test format; pure test infrastructure update.
DRIVERS coordination ticket for spec change prohibiting $readPreference to standalone servers; new spec requirement rollout.
Cross-driver coordination to unify unknown BSON type error messages; DRIVERS-level spec/standardization effort.
DRIVERS coordination ticket for SPEC-1540/1542 requiring drivers to raise error on hint for unacknowledged OP_MSG/OP_UPDATE.
Change stream spec clarification on suppressing errors when killing cursor before resuming; spec authoring improvement.
Server 6.2+ removes getNonce command; Issue split coordination for drivers to stop using it; new server constraint, not a prior nonconformance.
Adding FLE corpus test exhaustively enumerating encryption axes; test infrastructure addition, not fixing driver behavior.
Server 6.0 makes allowDiskUse opt-out; Issue split coordination for driver awareness; new server behavior, not nonconformance.
Resync change stream spec tests to validate drivers do not resume on ElectionInProgress; test infrastructure update.
Relax ValidateWorkloadExecutor event assertions for drivers lacking CMAP; test runner/infrastructure update.
Race condition in CMAP pool-checkout-no-idle.yml; adding backgroundThreadIntervalMS to test spec to avoid flakiness.
SDAM spec conflicted: required direct connection to non-data-bearing servers but only created pools for data-bearing servers.
Race condition in pool-clear-clears-waitqueue.yml CMAP test; Issue split to fix test across all drivers.
Race condition in pool-clear-min-size.yml CMAP test; spec-change label; fixing test event ordering issue.
CMAP integration test pool-create-min-size-error.json waits for wrong event (ConnectionClosed vs ConnectionPoolCleared).
CMAP test enables failpoint on isMaster without appName scope, risking interference with subsequent tests.
Adding missing spec test that WaitQueue eviction error is retryable; Issue split across all drivers.
SERVER-75122 removes client secrets from OIDC config/saslStart; DRIVERS investigation ticket for spec/driver impact.
Spec defined bulkWriteResult as non-optional causing driver confusion when no keys rewrapped; spec gap requiring amendment.
CSE Prose Test 13 wording insufficient to verify addKeyAltName success; improving prose test assertions.
Optimization of removeKeyAltName to use single findOneAndUpdate with aggregation pipeline; no spec violation, internal improvement.
SERVER-75121 removes JWKS URI from OIDC config; DRIVERS investigation ticket for spec/driver impact.
CSE unified spec tests unnecessarily used on-demand credentials syntax; removing to unblock drivers testing Key Management API.
updateOne-let/updateMany-let YAML tests used pipeline-style updates incompatible with stated minServerVersion 3.6; test fix.
Evergreen CI script failing due to infrastructure change; build/CI issue unrelated to driver spec behavior.
Server 7.0 makes dropping nonexistent collection a noop; Issue split for driver awareness; server behavior change, not nonconformance.
Spec clarification that mongocryptd must not spawn when bypassAutoEncryption=true; adding prose tests to validate behavior.
Improving CSE prose tests for mongocryptd bypass to make failure reasons clearer; test infrastructure improvement only.
User accidentally filed a personal laptop/keychain issue in MongoDB DRIVERS project; completely unrelated.
ADL build script using outdated Go version causing CI failure; build/CI infrastructure issue, no spec involvement.
Syncing CRUD spec tests to add pipeline-style bulk write update tests from SPEC-1455; test infrastructure update.
QE v2 protocol removes need for ECC state collection; Issue split for drivers to update QE helpers; new protocol requirement.
Spec requires provider when masterKey set in RewrapManyDataKey; drivers (e.g. C) return no error with null provider.
Routine maxWireVersion bump to 21 for MongoDB 7.0; proactive spec compliance update, not a prior nonconformance.
Adding BSON corpus tests for decimal128 clamped zeros with very large exponents to catch Go driver-class bugs in others.
New feature: GCP attached service account support for KMS; Issue split rollout, not a prior driver nonconformance.
New feature: Azure VM Managed Identity for automatic KMS credentials; Issue split rollout, not a prior driver nonconformance.
Adding missing spec test that reads are not retried inside transactions; would have caught JAVA-4684 regression.
URL migration from docs.mongodb.com to www.mongodb.com/docs for SEO; documentation only, no behavior change.
Server deprecating collStats/currentOp commands by 7.0; Issue split for drivers to migrate to aggregation pipeline stages.
Time series collection options tests backported to MongoDB 6.3; Issue split coordination to run tests on new server version.
